description_long: This is an adult human figure dressed in formal business attire, featuring a fitted blazer over a collared shirt and straight-leg trousers. The figure has a medium build and stands upright with arms extended horizontally to the sides. The head is covered with a medium-length, side-parted hairstyle that frames the face. The feet are clad in low-heeled dress shoes, and the hands are open and relaxed. The overall appearance suggests a professional individual, suitable for urban or office environments. No accessories or carried objects are visible.
description: A professionally dressed adult in a business suit with a collared shirt, standing upright with arms outstretched. The figure has a medium build and a neat, medium-length hairstyle.
description_view_0: Front view shows the full business suit, collared shirt, and the face framed by a medium-length hairstyle.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the face, the fitted blazer, and the straight-leg trousers.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the blazer, trousers, and the hairstyle falling to the neck.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the profile and the clean lines of the outfit.
attribute_clothing_type: business suit with collared shirt and straight-leg trousers
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms extended horizontally
